sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4877" key="a)malhto/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμαλητόμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">τέμνω</etym>) <sense id="n4877.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reaper,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:522" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.522</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
